name: shiritori-game-workspace
description: Shiritori game monorepo — two-player online + feature-rich kawaii app.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:app && npm run install:kawaii
scripts.flutter:clean: cd shiritori-flutter && flutter clean && flutter pub get
scripts.build: npm run install:app && npm --prefix shiritori-online run build
scripts.build:kawaii: npm run install:kawaii && npm --prefix kawaii-shiritori run build
scripts.build:flutter: cd shiritori_flutter && flutter pub get && flutter build web
scripts.deploy:flutter: npm run build:flutter && cd shiritori_flutter && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting --project shiritori-game-ccaae
scripts.lint: npm run lint:online && npm run lint:kawaii
scripts.lint:json: npm run validate:json && npm run format:json:check
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run security:check && npm run test && npm run build && npm run build:kawaii
scripts.deploy: npm run install:app && npm --prefix shiritori-online run deploy
scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run install:app && npm --prefix shiritori-online run deploy:hosting
scripts.deploy:database: npm run install:app && npm --prefix shiritori-online run deploy:database
scripts.deploy:firestore: npm run install:kawaii && npm --prefix kawaii-shiritori run deploy:firestore
scripts.deploy:kawaii: npm run install:kawaii && npm --prefix kawaii-shiritori run deploy
scripts.deploy:kawaii:hosting: npm run install:kawaii && npm --prefix kawaii-shiritori run deploy:hosting
scripts.deploy:flutter: cd shiritori-flutter && flutter build web --release && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:flutter:staging: cd shiritori-flutter && flutter build web --release && firebase hosting:channel:deploy develop
scripts.deps:outdated: npm run deps:outdated:online && npm run deps:outdated:kawaii
scripts.ci:validate: npm run format:check && npm run validate:json && npm run lint
scripts.ci:build: npm run build && npm run build:kawaii
scripts.ci:fast: npm run ci:validate && npm run build:track
scripts.ci:full: npm run ci:validate && npm run test && npm run ci:build
scripts.security:audit: npm --prefix shiritori-online audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix kawaii-shiritori audit --audit-level=high || true
scripts.infra:validate: cd infra/terraform && terraform validate && terraform fmt -check
scripts.infra:dev: cd infra/terraform/environments/dev && terraform init && terraform validate
scripts.infra:staging: cd infra/terraform/environments/staging && terraform init && terraform validate
scripts.infra:production: cd infra/terraform/environments/production && terraform init && terraform validate
scripts.tofu:dev: cd infra/terraform/environments/dev && tofu init && tofu validate
scripts.monitor:elk:lite: cd monitoring/elk && docker compose -f docker-compose.lite.yml up -d
scripts.monitor:elk:lite:stop: cd monitoring/elk && docker compose -f docker-compose.lite.yml down
scripts.monitor:elk:lite:logs: cd monitoring/elk && docker compose -f docker-compose.lite.yml logs -f
scripts.monitor:grafana:stop: docker stop grafana && docker rm grafana
scripts.monitor:all:start: npm run monitor:elk:start && npm run monitor:grafana:start
scripts.monitor:all:stop: npm run monitor:elk:stop && npm run monitor:grafana:stop
